title: marisculus peteri
intro_study: According to "Nutrire : revista de Sociedade Brasileira de Alimentacao e Nutricao = journal of the Brazilian Society of Food and Nutrition", Marisculus peteri (also known as Myrtus) has been found to have benefits such as improving the oxidative and microbial stability of products containing salmon and reducing the damage caused by skin burns.
side_effects: Marisculus peteri can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea and dizziness due to its high levels of toxic compounds. Ingestion of large quantities can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including vomiting and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory problems. If not handled correctly, Marisculus peteri can also cause kidney damage due to its high levels of certain toxins.
